name: rental-analyzer
description: Rental Property Analyzer — turn a rent roll + T12 + loan terms into an investor-grade pro forma. Produces an editable Excel model (Current vs. Proforma, NOI, cap rate, DSCR, cash-on-cash, loan amortization, multi-year projection) and a polished PDF report with KPI dashboard and charts. Standalone; no API or MCP required.
